paper.description: Primary paper-reading orchestrator. Use for academic PDF reading, paper explanation, literature notes, and report writing.

reader-deep.description: Blind independent paper reader. Reads the source only and returns structured technical notes; never reads the primary agent's draft.

arbiter.description: Paper-analysis arbiter. Compares two independent readings against the original paper and produces a corrected final judgement.

diagnose.description: Escalation reader for hard disagreements. Reads the paper from scratch and explains the exact cause of conflict without forcing a verdict.
